title: hartogia villosa
intro: Hartogia villosa, also known as hairy calabash, is a tropical plant species native to the Caribbean and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Hartogia villosa include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for internal use, or as a topical cream or ointment for external applications.
